---
title: "Your Name"
about:
  template: jolla          # try: trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  image: profile.jpg
  links: # Use bootstrap icons: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:you@example.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yourhandle
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://fosstodon.org/@yourhandle
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000
---

Welcome! I'm a [PhD student / postdoc / researcher] at **Your University**,
working on [your topic in one sentence].

This site is where I keep my CV, publications, and an occasional blog post.
